subcodes.first_line: O Bahman, O Khusraw son of Bahman of the lineage of Esfandiyar the Brazen-bodied, this form hath ever yearned for gardens and meadows [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بهمن ای خسرو بهمن پور اسفندیار رواین تن همواره هوس گلزار و چمن مینمود و
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @the ephemeral and the eternal, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @stories; anecdotes
